requirements_addressed: tool.exec event emitted for Bash tool invocations in SDK stream
Secret redaction applied to cmd, stdout_tail, stderr_tail
Tool names sanitised against shell metacharacters
Non-Bash tools (Write, Edit, Glob) do NOT emit tool.exec events
stdout_tail and stderr_tail truncated to last 500 chars
Existing tool tracking in _track_tool_call still works

completion_promises.criterion_text: tool.exec event emitted for Bash tool invocations in SDK stream
completion_promises.evidence: Added _emit_tool_exec_event() method to AgentInvoker that constructs and emits ToolExecEvent for Bash tool invocations. Test TestBashToolEmitsEvent verifies event emission with correct fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Secret redaction applied to cmd, stdout_tail, stderr_tail
completion_promises.evidence: SecretRedactor.redact() is applied to cmd, stdout_tail (after truncation), and stderr_tail (after truncation) before ToolExecEvent construction. Tests TestSecretRedaction::test_cmd_secrets_redacted and TestSecretRedaction::test_stdout_secrets_redacted verify Bearer tokens, sk- keys, and SECRET= values are redacted.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tool names sanitised against shell metacharacters
completion_promises.evidence: sanitise_tool_name() from llm_instrumentation.py is applied to tool_name before ToolExecEvent construction. Tests TestToolNameSanitisation::test_tool_name_sanitised and test_emitted_event_has_sanitised_name verify metacharacters are stripped.

Uses asyncio.create_task() for fire-and-forget emission, identical pattern to _emit_llm_call_event(). _safe_emit() wrapper catches and logs exceptions. TestNonBlockingEmission verifies emission failure does not propagate.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Non-Bash tools (Write, Edit, Glob) do NOT emit tool.exec events
completion_promises.evidence: _emit_tool_exec_event() checks tool_name against _TOOL_EXEC_EVENT_TOOLS frozenset({'Bash'}) and returns early for non-Bash tools. TestNonBashToolsIgnored::test_write_tool_does_not_emit_tool_exec verifies Write tool is filtered out.

completion_promises.criterion_text: stdout_tail and stderr_tail truncated to last 500 chars
completion_promises.evidence: stdout_tail[-500:] and stderr_tail[-500:] applied before redaction and event construction. TestOutputTruncation::test_stdout_truncated_to_500_chars verifies 1000-char inputs are truncated to 500.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Existing tool tracking in _track_tool_call still works (file tracking unchanged)
completion_promises.evidence: _track_tool_call() and _parse_tool_invocations() in TaskWorkStreamParser are completely unchanged. TestExistingFileTracking::test_write_tool_still_tracked and test_edit_tool_still_tracked verify Write/Edit file tracking still works. 393 total instrumentation tests pass with zero regressions.

TestRedactionPipelineContract class with @pytest.mark.seam and @pytest.mark.integration_contract markers. Three tests validate: Bearer token redaction, sk- key redaction, and sanitise_tool_name metacharacter stripping.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover: Bash tool event, non-Bash tool ignored, redaction applied, sanitisation
completion_promises.evidence: 15 tests total covering all scenarios: TestBashToolEmitsEvent, TestSecretRedaction (cmd + stdout/stderr), TestToolNameSanitisation (2 tests), TestNonBlockingEmission, TestNonBashToolsIgnored, TestOutputTruncation, TestExistingFileTracking (2 tests), TestRedactionPipelineContract (3 tests), TestBashEventWithAllFields, TestMultipleBashToolEvents.
